description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-build that runs on push to the master branch, excluding changes to docs, README.md, and NEWS.md, and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: coverage and build, both running on ubuntu-latest. The coverage job checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs autogen, configure, and make, then uploads coverage data to Coveralls. The build job checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs autogen, configure, and make, then creates a distributable package and uploads it as a build artifact.
